title: Elderly Care Mission and Vision
content:
Elderly Care Mission and Vision

The mission of Üsküdar University Aged Care Program is to integrate and absorb the necessary knowledge, skills and values about the elderly care service of students who will benefit from the program; to ensure that they are competent health technicians who have the quality of implementing and developing aged care services in public space, private and non-governmental organizations.

The vision of the Üsküdar University Aged Care Program is the ability to fulfill the care needed by elderly individuals, prepare and provide the necessary environments, contribute to the development of the health standards of elderly people and improve the quality of life, have the ability to implement analytical thinking, implement and develop elderly care services, develop solutions, team and to train professional staff with a sense of responsibility.
